# Rules for src/components/ModalOverlay/ModalOverlay.css

<!-- Generated by proofd. Source: src/components/ModalOverlay/ModalOverlay.css. Do not edit manually. -->

## Modal Overlay (modal-overlay)

- [MO-01] Shared modal wrapper: fixed overlay, inset 0, z-index 100. modal-content has frosted glass: background color-mix(bg-surface 93%, transparent) + backdrop-filter blur(12px). Blocks all keystrokes except Escape and Ctrl+comma via stopPropagation. Backdrop click calls onClose only when closeOnBackdropClick prop is true (default true); when false, the overlay onClick is undefined.
